title: Energy shock starts to bite in Europe: UK household bills set for 'deeply unwelcome' 2-year high
summary_full: “Ongoing conflict in the Middle East is impacting the price we pay for energy,” the head of the U.K.’s energy regulator said.
summary_public: “Ongoing conflict in the Middle East is impacting the price we pay for energy,” the head of the U.K.’s energy regulator said.
